introduction: In the mid 16th century, classical East Bengal context - after being betrayed by her fiancé - the young female writer Chandrabati exiles herself inside a Shiva Temple and resorts to re-write the great Indian epic `Ramayana', rebelliously establishing ignored point of view of Sita- diminishing the iconic hero of the epic Rama.Set in 16th century Eastern Bengal, the film is inspired by the life of Chandrabati, Bengal's first feminist poet. The story follows her falling in love with another poet, Jayananda, who later leaves her for another woman. The betrayal pushes Chandrabati to renounce marriage, confine herself inside a Shiva temple and start rewriting the Ramayana - an act which eventually led to her becoming a historic figure.
